历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16619 → 17427 → 21046 → 19519 → 17147, showing an overall fluctuation of first decreasing then increasing; in 2023, there was a significant drop (21046th), in 2024 it recovered somewhat, and in 2025 it further recovered to 17147th, with a cumulative advance of about 3900 positions in the last two years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 17147th; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 48 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 45 in 2025, showing a slight year-on-year decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 44, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025, marking the fifth consecutive year of enrollment reduction, slightly intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, overall stable at the mid-tier 211 level; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 657,000, indicating some exposure on short video platforms but not extremely hot, having a neutral impact on application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no records of A- or above level disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly concentrated in maritime-specific fields such as Transportation Engineering and Navigation Technology, related to the transportation majors in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation; 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) are all high-heat directions, with related majors' application heat continuing to rise, potentially pushing up overall competition; the province's total number of candidates in 2026 is 209,000, with an estimated 135,850 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, far from Chongqing, making it a cross-province study destination.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 17147th, a reduction of 1 enrollment spot in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates (eased competition), and the continued heating of related engineering majors (intensified competition), the combined effect of enrollment reduction and major heat increase slightly outweighs the easing effect of the candidate number decrease; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition slightly intensifies); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16968th, with a range of 16468–17468th.
